ticket_text: I was charged twice for my March invoice. Can you refund the duplicate?
Checkout has been failing intermittently since this morning.
A former employee still has admin access and downloaded our customer list last night.
The reporting dashboard takes about 40 seconds to load since yesterday. It is usable but slow for the whole finance team.
How do I invite a teammate to my workspace?
This is the third time I am writing. Your product is terrible and I want a manager NOW.
